label: p9_h3_rejected_q4_t16_selected_silu_256_threads
hardware: local RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 24 GiB card; W7900 rerun unverified
change: Prototype launched q4_k_t16_selected_dual_silu_direct_gemv_kernel with 256 threads instead of the retained 128-thread topology.
decision: Reject and revert. Synthetic selected-GEMV fixtures passed, but full 512/16 graph replay regressed 78.745 -> 76.365 tok/s and changed the generated final token 38118 -> 37065; the retained 128-thread reduction topology remains required for P9.E2 alignment.
